fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` exposes static methods for both single-frame and animated WebP
encoding. Single-frame images are encoded via the `Encode` overloads; animated
WebP sequences are encoded via `EncodeAnimated`.

All overloads accept <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions> to control quality
and compression settings.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = SKBitmap.Decode("photo.png");
using var pixmap = bitmap.PeekPixels();
var options = SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default;
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(pixmap, options);
File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding images and animated sequences in the WebP format.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> object.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

params.dst: The output stream to write the encoded WebP data to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP format and writes the result to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
